## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss team structure, quality expectations, and client management processes for GrowthX's content marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current team structure needs realignment to match original vision: Directors lead strategy, MEs execute, CMs handle specific tasks](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Quality control and client communication processes need improvement, especially for new team members](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [More systematic approach needed for developing content strategies and assignments for clients](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Additional ME support required to fill gaps, particularly for Pratik's accounts](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)

## Topics

### Team Structure and Roles

  - [Original vision: Directors lead strategy and client relationships, MEs execute and delegate to CMs, CMs focus on specific tasks](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Current reality: Roles often blurred, with CMs sometimes doing ME work and MEs trying to drive strategy](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Need to reset expectations and realign roles to original vision](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Directors should lead client relationships for first 12 weeks, gradually transitioning to MEs](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)

### Quality Expectations and Client Management

  - [High-budget clients require more polished deliverables and strategic communication](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Need for calibration on quality levels expected from CMs and what MEs should watch for](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Importance of understanding client expectations and relationship management](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Some team members lack experience in client-facing roles, need guidance](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

### Content Strategy Development

  - [Example given of Fathom AI: Need for more thoughtful, strategic approach to content planning](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Importance of understanding client's product, audience, and competitive landscape before creating assignments](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Use of tools and workflows to develop initial content strategies, but need for human refinement and customization](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)

### Workflow and Tool Utilization

  - [Some team members struggling to learn and effectively use company workflows (e.g., AirOps)](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Need for more training and protected time for team members to learn systems](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [Demonstration of workflow for generating content assignments, but emphasis on human refinement of output](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2730.0)

### Specific Client Challenges

  - [Vapi: New CM, ME, and Director all onboarding simultaneously, causing communication issues](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Unstructured: Similar challenges with new team members](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Pratik's accounts: Need for additional ME support, potentially from Becerra or new hire](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=3064.0)

### Service Offerings and Delivery

  - [Some services (e.g., backlinks, programmatic SEO) sold before fully developed, causing stress](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Need to balance selling new offerings with ability to deliver effectively](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1999.0)
  - [Consideration of packaging services differently (e.g., combining backlinking with distribution and ghostwriting)](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)

### Team Member Development

  - [Discussion of Sadira's potential for promotion to ME role](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=3197.0)
  - [Need for additional ME support, with new hire starting May 19th](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=3072.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Realign team roles to match original vision: Directors lead strategy, MEs execute, CMs handle specific tasks](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Implement more systematic approach to developing content strategies for clients](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [Provide additional support and training for team members on workflows and tools](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [Assess Sadira's potential for ME role and determine best way to support Pratik's accounts](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=3197.0)
  - [Prepare for onboarding of new ME on May 19th](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=3072.0)
  - [Review and potentially repackage service offerings to ensure effective delivery](https://fathom.video/share/3nHg7ssXAsyQpGAU6zqzvLXT7SgGsDLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1999.0)
